note: Sidebar (Agent 1) + application of grammar-sk-pass2.json findings + fresh cross-field consistency sweep (§21.4), directly into intermediate.json.

sidebar.source: Built solely from blogPost.blocks[] content.rich-text text (blocks 0,1,3,4,5). No external knowledge used. Uncertain century for the '30. roky' coin-deposit find (text never states the century) marked with an explicit ⚠ NEISTY note in the timeline description rather than asserted as fact.

appliedFixes.before: Jedná sa o denáre viacerých rímskych cisárov
appliedFixes.after: Ide o denáre viacerých rímskych cisárov

appliedFixes.note: also written correctly ('Marca Aurelia') directly in the newly authored keyFacts item 'Depot rímskych mincí' — no stale form propagated

appliedFixes.before: sa nemusí jednať o jeden naraz ukrytý depot
appliedFixes.after: nemusí ísť o jeden naraz ukrytý depot

appliedFixes.note: before-string had NFD diacritic (a + combining U+0308) not matching the hand-typed NFC pattern from grammar-sk-pass2.json; resolved by locating the exact codepoints in the live file (memory: nfd-nfc-diacritics-gotcha) and inserting U+0165 'ť' directly after the existing decomposed 'ä', leaving its encoding untouched

crossFieldSweep.result: No stale pre-fix forms found anywhere outside body (grep-verified: 'Jedná sa', 'jednať o', 'Marca Aurélia', 'n.l.', 'lužickej kultury', 'pädesiatych rokoch' all 0 occurrences file-wide after fixes). excerpt was already independent of the fixed sentences, no propagation needed.

protectedZones: No quote-block / blockquote components in this article; no dated-source verbatim quotes in body — nothing exempted.
